Background.key_experience: Witnessed a major supply chain collapse at a former employer caused by a supervisor's emotional favoritism, leading him to believe that human sentiment is the primary failure point in any system.

Cognition.bias: The Objectivity Illusion—the belief that his own perspective is purely factual and devoid of the biases he attributes to others.

Current_State.recent_memory: Calculated the exact depreciation per mile of his vehicle during the morning commute and realized his current route is mathematically suboptimal by three minutes.
